title: Implement cart state with React Context + useReducer and localStorage persistence
acceptance_criteria: CartProvider is a 'use client' component and wraps children in root layout.
Cart state supports ADD_ITEM, REMOVE_ITEM, UPDATE_QUANTITY, and CLEAR_CART actions.
Adding an existing item increments quantity instead of duplicating.
localStorage persists cart state and rehydrates on mount without hydration mismatch.
useCart hook throws a clear error when used outside CartProvider.
Cart totals (item count and price) can be derived from state.
